violations.detail: This stage uses conda/mamba/micromamba as a Python package installer on a GPU/PyTorch base image. For narrow workflows that do not rely on `conda env create` or an `environment.yml`, uv is usually a faster, lock-friendly alternative with explicit CUDA wheel index support. See https://docs.astral.sh/uv/guides/integration/pytorch/ .
violations.message: GPU Python Dockerfile installs packages via conda; consider migrating to uv for faster, lock-friendly installs
violations.sourceCode: RUN conda install -y numpy scipy transformers

suggestedFix.description: AI AutoFix: migrate from conda to uv
